Originally Published: September 2018 p.m.
Soledad O'Brien, 11:30 a.m., Yavapai College Performing Arts Center, 1100 Sheldon Prescott. Hear take roles play communities create meaningful change.
tell book cover? p.m., Prescott Public Library, Goodwin Street, Founders Suite (1st floor). Professional Writers Prescott (PWP) will host Mariah Sinclair, award-winning book cover designer.
ESL, 7:30 p.m., Prescott Valley Public Library, Genealogy Room, 7401 Civic Circle.
Rockin' Ukes, 6:30 7:30 p.m., Prescott Valley Public Library-Crystal Room, 7401 Civic Circle Rockin' Ukes ukulele-centric band that plays eclectic classic rock, folk, country whatever they feel like playing. Seating limited come early seat. 928-759-3040.
Join Scouting Night, 6:30 p.m., Luke's Episcopal Church, 2000 Shepherds Lane, Prescott. Hosted Scout Troop Pack Girl Scout Troop also open girls want join. 928-772-1312 email pack43@cox.net.
Sedona International Film Festival Presents "Quiz Show," Mary Fisher Theater, 2030 Highway 89A. Tickets $4.25 purchased calling 928-282-1177 online 928-282-1177.
